designNotes.baselineFinalSacrifice: If Mass Sacrifice consumes 4+ distinct combo states: damage ×1.5. 5 states: ×2.0. Implemented in staff.ts preRoll — NOT a talent.

buildIdentities.plague_doctor: DoT multiplier + ailmentPotency + durationBonus gear. Cast Locust/Haunt/Toads first, then Sac to detonate DoTs. Slow windup, sustained payoff, AoE-heavy.
buildIdentities.spirit_caller: Spell power + maxHp gear. Keep minions alive, refresh constantly, use Sac as detonation-nuke. Medium pace, minion-maintenance build. Minions absorb incoming damage.
buildIdentities.voodoo_master: Crit chance + crit multiplier + cooldown recovery gear. Stack soul_stacks × 5 + hex, Sac for ceiling burst. Spiky, glass-cannon, single-target king.

branches.theme: Your diseases are the weapon. Mass Sacrifice doesn't end the disease — it amplifies it.

nodes.name: Rotting Dose
nodes.description: +15/30% DoT damage multiplier.
engineFields: dotMultiplier (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Toxic Reserves
nodes.description: +10/20% ailment potency.
engineFields: ailmentPotency (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Festering Wound
nodes.description: Consuming Plagued with Mass Sacrifice applies 3 stacks of poison to every enemy hit.
engineFields: plaguedConsumePoisonStacks (NEW — numeric, read in staff.ts preRoll)

nodes.name: Lingering Contagion
nodes.description: +20/40% ailment duration.
engineFields: ailmentDuration (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Virulent Strike
nodes.description: +10/20% damage while 3+ debuffs active on the target.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileTargetAilmentCount (EXISTS in TriggerCondition)

nodes.name: Disease Carrier
nodes.description: +3/6% damage per debuff on target.
engineFields: conditionalMods.perAilmentStackOnTarget (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Vile Contagion
nodes.description: +10/20% chaos penetration.
engineFields: chaosPenetration (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Contagion Sacrifice
nodes.description: When Mass Sacrifice consumes Plagued, spread ALL active DoTs to every enemy in the pack (upgrade to baseline pandemic which is Plague of Toads only).
engineFields: massSacrificePandemic (NEW — boolean; staff.ts preRoll sets pandemicSpread=true when skill=mass_sacrifice + state=plagued + this flag)

nodes.name: Plague Support
nodes.description: +15/30% damage for skills tagged with DoT.
engineFields: incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Virulent Explosion
nodes.description: Each DoT on target at Mass Sacrifice cast time adds +8% burst damage.
engineFields: burstDamagePerDebuffOnTarget (NEW — numeric; tick.ts multiplies burstDamage by 1 + value × debuffCount/100)

nodes.name: Lingering Blight
nodes.description: After Mass Sacrifice, enemies hit reapply their consumed DoTs at 50% snapshot for 4s. Cost: −25% direct damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dotReapplyOnConsume (NEW — object); incDamage (EXISTS, negative)

nodes.name: Plague Lord
nodes.description: Pandemic from Mass Sacrifice spreads DoTs with FULL remaining duration (not just snapshots).
engineFields: pandemicFullDuration (NEW — boolean; tick.ts pandemic call sets refreshDuration=source.remainingDuration instead of 0)

nodes.name: THE ROT
nodes.description: Mass Sacrifice no longer deals direct damage. Instead applies a unique Rotting debuff: 10% of target max HP as chaos damage over 3s, unremovable.
engineFields: weaponDamageOverride/directDamageOverride (EXIST); rawBehaviors.rottingDebuff (NEW — object applied in staff.ts postCast)

branches.theme: The dead fight for you. Minions are the core — Mass Sacrifice is their ultimate tribute.

nodes.name: Pack Leader
nodes.description: +10/20% damage per minion alive.
engineFields: damagePerMinionAlive (NEW — numeric; tick.ts adds (value × activeMinions.length / 100) to damageMult)

nodes.name: Bone Warden
nodes.description: +15/30% minion max HP.
engineFields: minionHpMult (NEW — numeric; staff.ts summonMinions multiplies hp by (1 + value/100))

nodes.name: Spectral Pact
nodes.description: When Mass Sacrifice consumes Haunted, summon 1 temporary spirit (fetish-type variant) that attacks for 3s.
engineFields: hauntedConsumeSummonsSpirit (NEW — boolean; staff.ts preRoll summons spirit on haunted consume when flag set)

nodes.name: Undying Bond
nodes.description: +20/40% minion duration.
engineFields: minionDurationMult (NEW — numeric; staff.ts summonMinions multiplies duration by (1 + value/100))

nodes.name: Resurgent Swarm
nodes.description: After Mass Sacrifice consumes spirit_link, next Zombie Dogs/Fetish Swarm cast gains −50/100% cooldown.
engineFields: conditionalMods + new TriggerCondition afterMassSacrificeConsumedSpiritLink (NEW)

nodes.name: Bloody Pact
nodes.description: +5/10 life on hit while any minion is alive.
engineFields: conditionalMods + new TriggerCondition whileMinionsAlive (NEW)

nodes.name: Dog Tamer
nodes.description: Zombie Dog attack interval reduced by 0.5/1.0s.
engineFields: zombieDogAttackIntervalReduction (NEW — numeric; staff.ts summonMinions subtracts from attackInterval for zombie_dog)

nodes.name: Bloodbond
nodes.description: Detonation damage scales with minion MAX HP (not remaining HP).
engineFields: detonationUsesMaxHp (NEW — boolean; staff.ts detonateMinions uses m.maxHp instead of m.hp when flag set)

nodes.name: Minion Mastery
nodes.description: +15/30% minion attack damage.
engineFields: minionDamageMult (NEW — numeric; staff.ts summonMinions multiplies damage by (1 + value/100))

nodes.name: Ritual Burst
nodes.description: Detonation damage multiplied by number of minions detonated (2 dogs = ×2, 4 fetishes = ×4, both = ×6).
engineFields: detonationPerMinionMult (NEW — boolean; staff.ts preRoll multiplies detonation damage by detonated.length)

nodes.name: Phantom Tether
nodes.description: After detonation, spectral afterimages of detonated minions persist 4s dealing 50% of their damage. Cost: +6s cooldown on Zombie Dogs and Fetish Swarm.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.phantomAfterimages (NEW); rawBehaviors.perSkillCooldownIncrease (NEW — both read in staff.ts)

nodes.name: Soul Sacrifice
nodes.description: Each soul_stack consumed during Mass Sacrifice increases detonation damage by +25%.
engineFields: detonationPerSoulStackBonus (NEW — numeric; staff.ts preRoll multiplies detonation damage by 1 + value/100 × soulStackStacks)

nodes.name: LORD OF THE DEAD
nodes.description: Mass Sacrifice detonates minions, then IMMEDIATELY resummons both Zombie Dogs and Fetish Swarm at full HP. Cost: −40% Mass Sacrifice direct damage.
engineFields: resummonOnMassSacrifice (NEW — boolean; staff.ts preRoll calls summonMinions for both configs after detonation); incDamage (EXISTS, negative)

branches.theme: Consume everything for power. Pure burst escalation — the more you stack, the harder you hit.

nodes.name: Cursed Blade
nodes.description: +10/20% damage.
engineFields: incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Sharp Focus
nodes.description: +8/16% critical strike chance.
engineFields: incCritChance (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Hexbreaker
nodes.description: Consuming Hexed during Mass Sacrifice increases this cast's damage by an additional +50%.
engineFields: hexedConsumeMassSacrificeBonus (NEW — numeric; staff.ts preRoll multiplies damageMult by 1 + value/100 when consuming hexed on mass_sacrifice)

nodes.name: Biting Curse
nodes.description: +10/20% critical strike multiplier.
engineFields: incCritMultiplier (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Hunter's Ritual
nodes.description: +15/30% damage when target is below 50% HP.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileTargetBelowHp (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Cooldown Mastery
nodes.description: −10/20% cooldown on Mass Sacrifice.
engineFields: cooldownReduction (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Soul Harvester
nodes.description: Soul Harvest cooldown reduced by 1/2 seconds (feeds stack building).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.perSkillCooldownIncrease (NEW — shared with Phantom Tether)

nodes.name: Sacrificial Wisdom
nodes.description: Every combo state consumed by Mass Sacrifice refunds 15% of its cooldown.
engineFields: cdRefundPerStateConsumed (NEW — numeric; staff.ts preRoll pushes cdRefundPercent += value × consumedStateIds.length / 100)

nodes.name: Heavy Blow Support
nodes.description: +20/40% damage to Heavy-tagged skills.
engineFields: incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Endless Ritual
nodes.description: Each soul_stack now grants +30% damage on consume (up from +15%). Max cap raised 5 → 10 stacks.
engineFields: soulStackDamagePerStack (NEW — numeric); soulStackCapOverride (NEW — numeric; staff.ts preRoll uses override, combo.ts createComboState uses override when set)

nodes.name: Iron Will
nodes.description: Mass Sacrifice cannot miss and the first cast per encounter is a guaranteed crit. Cost: −20% damage for the rest of the encounter.
engineFields: cannotMiss (NEW — boolean; tick.ts skips hit roll when true); firstCastGuaranteedCrit (NEW — boolean; tick.ts force crit on firstSkillInEncounter); rawBehaviors.subsequentCastDamagePenalty (NEW)

nodes.name: Cascading Doom
nodes.description: If Mass Sacrifice crits, refresh duration of haunted, plagued, and hexed on all enemies hit.
engineFields: critRefreshesCombatStates (NEW — boolean; staff.ts postCast re-creates haunted/plagued/hexed at full duration on crit when flag set)

nodes.name: THE FINAL OFFERING
nodes.description: Mass Sacrifice resets the cooldown of every other skill. Cost: 50% current HP sacrificed per cast.
engineFields: resetAllCooldownsOnCast (NEW — boolean; tick.ts resets all skill timers in postCast); selfDamagePercent (EXISTS; deducts % current HP)
